items.title: GTLB Stock Set to Report Q2 Earnings: A Smart Buy or Risky Investment?
items.description: GitLab projects 24% revenue growth in Q2, driven by AI-driven DevSecOps momentum, but faces valuation concerns and tough competition.

items.title: Microsoft (MSFT) Unveils In-House AI Models MAI-Voice-1 And MAI-1 Preview
items.description: Microsoft (MSFT) recently experienced a 9% increase in its share price over the last quarter. This development coincided with the company's announcement of pioneering AI models like MAI-Voice-1 and MAI-1 Preview, positioning Microsoft as a competitive player in the AI space. These innovations may have supported the positive sentiment surrounding the stock. items.title: Can META's Focus on AI-Optimized Data Centers Push the Stock Higher?
items.description: Meta Platforms boosts 2025 capex to up to $72B, launches renewable-powered data centers, and eyes AI-driven expansion.
